summary: Iteration 27 testing complete. All 4 user-reported bugs verified FIXED: (1) Categories showing in POS with Pizzas/Drinks/Sides/Desserts and 11 products, (2) Reports page loads data (£1547.75 sales, 39 orders) with working Download PDF and View PDF buttons, (3) QR URLs use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL instead of localhost, (4) Printer Settings has no duplicate Discover/Add buttons. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only)

critical_code_review_comments: Bug #1 Fix: Categories now include restaurant_id field in API response, filtering works correctly
Bug #2 Fix: Reports stats endpoint returns all required fields (total_sales, total_orders, avg_order_value, cash_total, card_total), PDF generation returns valid PDF with correct headers
Bug #3 Fix: TableManagement.js getQRUrl() now uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL instead of window.location.origin
Bug #4 Fix: PrinterSettings.js empty state no longer shows duplicate Discover/Add buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified all 4 bug fixes: (1) POS categories visible with restaurant_id filtering, (2) Reports data loading with PDF download working, (3) QR URLs use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, (4) Printer page no duplicate buttons. All backend tests pass. All UI tests pass.

bug_1_categories_in_pos.evidence: POS screen shows All, Pizzas, Drinks, Sides, Desserts categories with 11 products
bug_1_categories_in_pos.api_test: GET /api/categories returns categories with restaurant_id field

bug_2_reports_and_pdf.evidence: Reports page shows £1547.75 sales, 39 orders, £39.69 avg order, £631.79 cash, £915.96 card
bug_2_reports_and_pdf.api_test: GET /api/reports/stats returns all fields, POST /api/reports/generate returns valid PDF (4289+ bytes)

bug_3_qr_url_localhost.evidence: QR dialog shows 4 tables with QR codes, code uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
bug_3_qr_url_localhost.code_review: TableManagement.js line 210: const baseUrl = process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL || window.location.origin

bug_4_printer_duplicate_buttons.evidence: Printer Settings shows exactly 1 Discover Printers button and 1 Add Printer button
bug_4_printer_duplicate_buttons.code_review: PrinterSettings.js empty state section removed duplicate buttons

features_verified.reports_stats_api: VERIFIED - Returns all required stats fields
features_verified.pdf_generation: VERIFIED - Returns valid PDF with correct headers
features_verified.date_filters: VERIFIED - Today, 7 Days, 30 Days, 90 Days all work

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocked endpoints.
